hooks.command: command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'cpln plugin: SessionStart rule injection skipped (jq not installed)' >&2; exit 0; }; R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-.}"; files=(); for f in "$R"/rules/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if sed -n '/^---$/,/^---$/p' "$f" | grep -qE '^alwaysApply:[[:space:]]*true[[:space:]]*$'; then files+=("$f"); fi; done; [ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ] && exit 0; ctx=$(cat "${files[@]}"); jq -nc --arg c "$ctx" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:$c}}'
